hero.subtitle: AI-Driven Insights For Faster, More Accurate Veterinary Decisions. Your Interactive Clinical Partner.

card.label: PETMED AI
card.question: I'm seeing a 15-year-old male Red-Eared Slider (Trachemys scripta elegans). Owner noticed swelling on the side of the head, lethargy, and decreased appetite for the past 2 weeks.
card.insightsBody: Based on this clinical presentation with unilateral head swelling, lethargy, anorexia, and suboptimal husbandry temperatures, here is the diagnostic reasoning.
card.inputPlaceholder: Describe symptoms, Or Request Diagnostic Guidance..

support.title: How We Support Your Decisions
support.subtitle: Veterinary medicine is getting harder. We make the complex simple.

overload.title: Information Overload
overload.body: Sifting through hundreds of pages of medical history takes hours. PetMed summarizes the critical vitals in seconds.

timeSensitive.title: Time-Sensitive Decisions
timeSensitive.body: In emergencies, every minute counts. Get rapid diagnostic paths when time isn't on your side.

uncertainty.title: Diagnostic Uncertainty
uncertainty.body: Cross-reference with millions of cases instantly.

evidence.title: Evidence-Based Insights
evidence.body: Every suggestion is backed by peer-reviewed literature and current best practices in veterinary oncology, cardiology, and more.

cards.title: Internal Medicine
cards.body: Comprehensive support for diagnosis and treatment management of general internal medicine diseases.

cards.title: Surgery / Emergency
cards.body: Criteria for initial evaluation and surgical intervention in emergency cases.

cards.title: Cardiology
cards.body: Diagnosis, staging, and treatment protocols for cardiac diseases.

cards.title: Gastroenterology
cards.body: Differential diagnosis of digestive diseases and interpretation of endoscopic findings.

cards.title: Pulmonology
cards.body: Image diagnosis and treatment options for respiratory diseases.

cards.title: Neurology
cards.body: Interpretation of neurological examinations and diagnostic support for neurological diseases.

meet.title: Meet PetMed.
meet.subtitle: Enhanced intuition with real-time data processing.

concerns.title: Difficulty in Emergency Judgment
concerns.body: "My pet might have ingested something... I'm unsure whether I should take them to the hospital immediately."

concerns.title: Anxiety About Subtle Symptoms
concerns.body: "My pet is favoring or dragging a leg but doesn't seem to be in pain... Should I go to the hospital?"

concerns.title: Training and Behavioral Questions
concerns.body: "House training isn't going well... I want to know how to make it successful."

concerns.title: Diet and Health Management Concerns
concerns.body: "Diarrhea has continued after changing food... Could it be that the new food doesn't suit my pet?"

reviews.title: Trusted in Practice
reviews.subtitle: Real experiences from veterinarians and independent doctors integrate PetMed AI into everyday cases.

steps.title: Sync Patient Data
steps.body: Connect your existing EMR. PetMed instantly ingests histories, labs, and imaging notes.

steps.title: AI Reasoning
steps.body: Our clinical engine maps findings against thousands of validated case studies and protocols.

steps.title: Confirm & Act
steps.body: Receive a structured report with weighted options, ready for your final clinical judgment.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to help you evaluate PetMed AI for your practice.

items.question: Is PetMed AI a replacement for clinical judgment?
items.answer: No. PetMed AI supports your decision-making with evidence-backed insights, but final clinical judgment remains with the veterinarian.

items.question: What data can I upload?
items.answer: You can upload lab results, imaging summaries, and clinical notes to provide more context for recommendations.

items.question: Does PetMed AI integrate with my EMR?
items.answer: Yes, we offer EMR integrations for supported systems. Contact us to confirm compatibility.

items.question: How do you ensure data security?
items.answer: We use encrypted storage, secure access controls, and follow industry best practices for handling clinical data.

pricing.subtitle: Join 2,000+ veterinary hospitals using PetMed to redefine animal care.

hero.subtitle: より速く、より正確な獣医判断のためのAIインサイト。対話型の臨床パートナーです。

card.label: PETMED AI
card.question: 15歳のオスのミシシッピアカミミガメ（Trachemys scripta elegans）を診ています。飼い主は頭部側面の腫れ、元気消失、食欲低下が2週間続いていると報告しています。
card.insightsBody: 片側性の頭部腫脹、活動低下、食欲不振、飼育温度の不十分さという臨床像に基づき、診断推論を示します。
card.chipNextSteps: 推奨される次のステップ
card.inputPlaceholder: 症状を入力、または診断ガイダンスを依頼...

support.title: 意思決定をどう支援するか
support.subtitle: 獣医医療はより複雑になっています。私たちはその複雑さをシンプルにします。

overload.title: 情報過多
overload.body: 膨大な病歴を読み解くには時間がかかります。PetMedは重要なバイタル情報を数秒で要約します。

timeSensitive.title: 時間制約のある判断
timeSensitive.body: 緊急時には1分1秒が重要です。時間がない状況でも迅速な診断経路を提示します。

uncertainty.title: 診断の不確実性
uncertainty.body: 数百万件の症例と即時に照合できます。

evidence.title: エビデンスに基づく知見
evidence.body: すべての提案は査読済み文献と、腫瘍学・循環器学などの最新ベストプラクティスに基づいています。

clinicalAreas.title: 幅広い臨床領域をカバー

cards.title: 内科
cards.body: 一般内科疾患の診断と治療方針の管理を包括的に支援します。

cards.title: 外科 / 救急
cards.body: 救急症例の初期評価と外科的介入の判断基準を提示します。

cards.title: 循環器
cards.body: 心疾患の診断、ステージング、治療プロトコルをサポートします。

cards.title: 消化器
cards.body: 消化器疾患の鑑別診断と内視鏡所見の解釈を支援します。

cards.title: 呼吸器
cards.body: 呼吸器疾患の画像診断と治療選択肢を提案します。

cards.title: 神経科
cards.body: 神経学的検査の解釈と診断支援を行います。

meet.title: PetMedとは。
meet.subtitle: リアルタイムのデータ処理で、直感を強化します。
benefits: 血液検査・画像検査を即時解析
文脈を踏まえた鑑別診断

cards.name: Tom Critchlow

steps.title: 患者データを同期
steps.body: 既存のEMRに接続し、病歴・検査・画像メモを即時に取り込みます。

steps.title: AI推論
steps.body: 数千件の検証済み症例とプロトコルに照合して判断を支援します。

steps.title: 確認して実行
steps.body: 重み付けされた選択肢を含むレポートを受け取り、最終判断を下せます。

faq.title: よくある質問
faq.subtitle: PetMed AIの導入を検討する際のポイントを簡潔にまとめました。

items.question: PetMed AIは臨床判断の代わりになりますか？
items.answer: いいえ。PetMed AIは根拠に基づく洞察で判断を支援しますが、最終判断は獣医師が行います。

items.question: どのようなデータをアップロードできますか？
items.answer: 検査結果、画像所見の要約、診療メモなどをアップロードして、より精度の高い提案を得られます。

items.question: EMRと連携できますか？
items.answer: はい。対応するEMRとの連携が可能です。互換性についてはお問い合わせください。

items.question: データの安全性はどう確保していますか？
items.answer: 暗号化ストレージと厳格なアクセス制御を採用し、臨床データの取り扱いに関する業界標準に準拠しています。
